title: Observation
description: The device→brain message: one snapshot of the target device's screen state, sent UP over the Tailscale 8765 channel for the cloud frontier ReAct loop to reason over. Tree-first cadence: ui_tree is always present; screenshot is included only when hasScreenshot is true AND the tree is blind or the model requested it (cuts cloud data + latency).

msg.$comment: MESSAGE-KIND discriminator (I2). Const 'observation' for every device→brain screen-snapshot frame — the SEPARATE key from an action's variant `type`, so message kind and action variant never collide on the wire.
msg.description: Message kind — always 'observation' for a device→brain screen-state frame (vs 'action' / 'action_result').

schema_version.description: Wire-contract version. Also encoded in the /v1/ path of every $id. Additive changes bump the minor; a breaking change bumps the /vN/ path + this major. 1.1 (additive, back-compatible): the intent.name enum grew from 15 to 26 (decision-9 comprehensive intents + open_settings + the guarded send_intent escape-hatch).

ui_tree.description: The actionable accessibility nodes from UiTreeReader.readScreen(), in pre-order DFS, capped at 80. Password fields are redacted at the boundary (see the invariant below).

allOf.$comment: PASSWORD-REDACTION INVARIANT (the whole point of the redaction gate): an is_password node's `text` MUST be the PASSWORD_PLACEHOLDER '·····' (five U+00B7 MIDDLE DOT), never the raw credential. This makes it a hard schema violation for a password node to carry real text on the wire.

screenshot.description: OPTIONAL base64-encoded PNG from the silent AccessibilityService.takeScreenshot(). Present only when device_capability.hasScreenshot is true and the step needs vision (tree-blind surface or model-requested). Password regions are redaction-gated on the device before capture. Ephemeral — never persisted server-side beyond the loop step.

timestamp.description: When this observation was captured. Integer = epoch milliseconds (Android System.currentTimeMillis, the native form); string = RFC 3339 date-time. Used for staleness / re-observe decisions.

allOf.$comment: A device that advertises hasScreenshot=false (e.g. XR) MUST NOT put a screenshot on the wire — the loop is tree-only there.
